footer.tagline: HSG student club connecting students with Balkan and ex-Yugoslav roots — and everyone curious about the culture — since 2013.

home.title: Yunited — Balkan & ex-Yu student club at HSG
home.description: Yunited connects students with roots from former Yugoslavia socially and professionally while fostering cultural exchange at the University of St. Gallen.

about.title: About — Yunited
about.description: Yunited fosters cultural exchange between students from former Yugoslavia at the University of St. Gallen. Founded 2013.

events.description: Upcoming events and past-event recaps from Yunited, the Balkan & ex-Yu student club at HSG.

members.description: Meet the board of Yunited, the Balkan & ex-Yu student club at HSG.

exchange.title: Exchange Students — Yunited
exchange.description: What Yunited offers incoming exchange students at HSG — and how outgoing HSG students can stay connected while abroad.

join.title: Join — Yunited
join.description: Become a Yunited member via uniclubs.ch — CHF 10 per semester for access to all events.
